title: Ruby Red Diamonds - Basic Weapons
description: changes the gear in Basic Weapons to a blood red, or ruby color.
body:
- Changes the diamond gear of the mod to the same red color and the vanilla resource pack.
 I often use Basic Weapons in my modpacks and I thought to make them red to match the vanilla pack so they werent blue.


  [>>>> MAIN RESOURCE PACK](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ruby-red-diamonds)
